expectations.evidence: Analysis section 1: 'Invalid shebang line (critical)' — clearly identifies #/bin/bash → #!/bin/bash

expectations.text: Identifies that the pipe character is interpreted by bash as a pipe operator
expectations.evidence: Analysis section 2: 'Unquoted pipe character causes shell piping (critical)' — correctly explains bash interprets | as pipe between echo and href=...

expectations.text: Provides a corrected version of the plugin script
expectations.evidence: Corrected status.sh output file with both fixes applied
